properties.property: -- Auto-converted from GraalScript -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (playerchats&&strequals(#c,rules)){ -- say2 Rules for Graalian Squares... -- #bEssentially, the 2 contestants -- #bwill be playing tic tac toe. -- #bThere are 9 players who are each -- #bassigned to a square. -- #bThe two contestants will take -- #bturns choosing squares. -- #bWhen they select the square, -- #bthey will then spar the -- #bperson assigned to that square. -- #bIf the contestant wins the -- #bspar, they win the square. -- #bIf not, their opponet wins the -- #bsquare. In the event of a tie, -- #bplayers will then be allowed -- #bto "steal" squares, by -- #bchoosing, and sparring a -- #bsquare occupied by the -- #bother contestant. First -- #bcontestant to get a tic -- #btac toe wins the game! -- }
